name: Dataminr Pulse for Splunk SOAR
description: Pulse's AI-powered real-time intelligence integrates into Splunk SOAR workflows for faster detection and response
latest_tested_versions: March 06, 2026, Dataminr Pulse, API v3 v4

list_names.description: List Names (comma-seperated values allowed). NOTE: If this field is blank, it will ingest alerts from all the lists of the Dataminr Pulse account

actions.description: Validate the asset configuration for connectivity using supplied configuration
Retrieve the list of all the watchlists
Fetch the details of the alerts from the Dataminr platform for the given List ID or query

use_asset_configured_lists.description: Use lists as configured in asset parameter

max_alerts.description: Maximum number of alerts to fetch (max 100)

actions.description: Get alert details from Dataminr using Dataminr Pulse API
actions.verbose: This action retrieves detailed alert information from Dataminr via the Dataminr Pulse API. You must provide either an Alert ID or an Artifact ID; if both are supplied, the Alert ID takes precedence. The response is returned in a rich, custom view format for better readability. This action is compatible only with API version v4 and will return a clear, user-friendly error message if executed with API version v3.

example_values: Protest mentioning Palestinian territories planned for August 22 at 17:00 in Sabarmati, Gujarat, India: Local Source via X.
Relative path traversal in Windows Kerberos allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

The NSA has said that malicious activity outlined in its advisory partially overlaps with China-affiliated APT Salt Typhoon, with some activities linked to multiple China-based entities. The UK NCSC and international partners have now linked three China-based companies to Salt Typhoon campaigns targeting foreign governments and critical networks. The FBI has said that China-affiliated APT Salt Typhoon compromised at least 200 US organizations and targeted companies in 80 countries.

actions.description: Ingest alerts from Dataminr using Dataminr Pulse API
